channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Anyone who doesn’t feel for Palestinians is not human: Egypt coach Hassan
item.description: Hossam Hassan uses his FIFA World Cup news conference to raise awareness about the plight of Palestinians in Gaza.

item.title: Cuba sees nationwide power blackout for third time in six months
item.description: People in Cuba already faced an ongoing economic and humanitarian crisis, largely due to a US blockade.

item.title: Russia sends weapons to help Mali’s government hold off rebel siege
item.description: The Russian navy is carrying a shipment of weapons to help Mali’s government hold off a rebel advance.

item.title: FIFA defends Balogun red card referee after Trump calls him ‘a bit suspect’
item.description: Raphael Claus is 'one of the world's leading professional referees', FIFA says, following Trump's comments.

item.title: Balogun reprieve in vain as Belgium beat USA to set up Spain quarterfinal
item.description: Folarin Balogun's starting place, after a suspended red card, unable to influence USA, who succumb to superior Belgium.

item.title: Venezuela earthquakes death toll jumps to more than 3,500
item.description: Experts warn of an impending health crisis, with thousands sleeping in crowded temporary shelters.

item.title: ‘MAGA agenda on display’: FIFA, Trump slammed amid Balogun red card row
item.description: Football experts, officials warn of 'dangerous precedent' set by FIFA after U-turn on red card for USA forward Balogun.

item.title: Mbappe calls Paraguayan lawmaker ‘despicable’ over racist attack
item.description: France captain Kylian Mbappe has condemned racist comments from a Paraguayan senator.

item.title: Why el-Obeid matters as Sudan’s war enters a new phase
item.description: How fighting for el-Obeid could shape both Sudan's war and its humanitarian crisis.

item.title: Gambian mothers fear for their daughters as court weighs FGM ban
item.description: As The Gambia's Supreme Court prepares to rule on the FGM ban, mothers fear the law could be weakened.

item.title: Trevor Noah mocks Trump-FIFA World Cup red card controversy
item.description: Comedian Trevor Noah joked that Trump’s intervention in Folarin Balogun’s red card saga was “government interference."

item.title: Iran war live: Khamenei’s body arrives in Qom; Hamas cedes Gaza governance
item.description: Iran holds huge funeral for slain supreme leader as Hamas paves way for a technocratic committee to take over in Gaza.

item.title: Ronaldo says his last World Cup is over but Portugal decision can wait
item.description: Portugal captain admits his team's last-16 match against Spain was his final outing in the World Cup.

item.title: Over 5,500 children displaced by fighting in Sudan’s el-Obeid, charity says
item.description: Save the Children says families in and around the city of el-Obeid are facing increasingly difficult conditions.

item.title: Leading US Democrats withdraw support for Platner after assault allegations
item.description: Monday's accusations are the latest in a long string of controversies surrounding the Maine Democratic Senate candidate.

item.title: All to know about Ronaldo’s World Cup career as it ends in Spain loss
item.description: The Portuguese captain became the only player to score in six World Cups after his brace against Uzbekistan.

item.title: Late Spain goal eliminates Portugal, ends Ronaldo’s international career?
item.description: Sub Mikel Merino scores in stoppage time to give Spain a 1-0 win over Portugal in the last 16.

item.title: Canada picks Germany’s TKMS for new submarines
item.description: The German-owned naval shipbuilder made the bid with NATO ally Norway, beating out South Korea's Hanwha Ocean.

item.title: ‘If you win, it’s a stain’: Americans react to FIFA-Balogun controversy
item.description: USA supporters divided on Trump's intervention and FIFA's decision to suspend striker's ban in Belgium World Cup match.

item.title: One Phone Call, One Vanishing Red Card — The Balogun Scandal
item.description: Al Jazeera's Basel Ghazoghli (@baselgazi) breaks down how the White House helped Folarin Balogun stay in the World Cup.

item.title: Morocco says it has dismantled ISIL-linked cell planning attack
item.description: Police arrest 10 suspects, seizing bladed weapons, military-style clothes and bomb‑making instructions.

item.title: Influencers say they’re ‘honoured’ to attend Khamenei funeral
item.description: Several social media influencers travelled to Iran for the state funeral of Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei.

item.title: Survivors and bodies still being pulled from rubble days after twin quakes
item.description: International aid teams have played a key part in Venezuela’s ‘miracle rescues’, days after twin earthquakes struck.

item.title: Macron arrives in Syria for talks ahead of NATO summit in Turkiye
item.description: The French president is the first leader from western Europe to visit Syria since the overthrow of Bashar al-Assad.

item.title: Mbappe, FFF hit back at Paraguayan senator Amarilla over racist tirade
item.description: Amarilla called Mbappe a 'colonised Cameroonian' after his penalty helped France knock Paraguay out of the World Cup.
